texto: I've lived an amazing life. There's no reason to focus on the bad. They teach you that in racing school. Keep your eye where you want your front tire to be. You don't want to be stuck in the rut? Then don't look at the rut. Always look at where you want to go.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Francesco Quinn que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “I've lived an amazing life. There's no reason to focus on the bad. They teach you that in racing …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre educacao, vida, focus, com foco em focus e school.
